title: Fresh Animations: Objects
description: Animates non-mob entities in Fresh Animations' style. An official FA extension.
body:
[](https://www.curseforge.com/members/freshlx/projects) [](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) [](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/freshlx/) [](https://ko-fi.com/freshlx) [](https://www.patreon.com/cw/FreshLX) [](https://discord.gg/Wxs7JEPMrH) [](https://x.com/Fresh_LX)
---


![Fresh Animations Extensions](https://imgur.com/tr9IVrp.png) Fresh Animations Extensions are extra resource packs with additional features for Fresh Animations.
- Load these packs above Fresh Animations to work correctly. - These packs are mostly suited for the vanilla look and aren't friendly to other resource packs. - These resource packs are made for and usually require Fresh Animations.

[](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

---

![Details](https://imgur.com/b5K7mZp.png)
This FA extension animates non-mob entities like chests, boats, and minecarts in Fresh Animations' style. - Re-animates Chests, Minecarts, Boats and Shulker Boxes. - Minecart has wheels and wobble along the bumpy track - Chests on boats slide when turning. - Boats have unique anims when on land. - Varied idle ore positions when a boat isn't ridden. - Vanilla+ style chest textures. Gives trapped chests a 3D button under the latch. - Ender chests have subtle unique animation. - Chests have unique animations for both opening and closing.



---
[](https://ko-fi.com/freshlx/posts)
Early access previews available on Ko-fi with a Golem Tier membership
---

Preferably including its name and a link to an official CurseForge, Modrinth, or Planet Minecraft page - The creator has the final say about which terms apply to your use of this resource pack and its assets ____________________________________________ ***With this resource pack, YOU MAY:*** - modify the resource pack if it's for personal use only, meaning you cannot share it publicly - include this resource pack in your mod pack or server - use this resource pack in forms of content such as videos, live streams, blog posts - use an edited version of this resource pack in forms of content such as videos, live streams, blog posts, if the edited version is not publicly available - remix, transform, and build upon its assets in your own resource pack, within reason, if credit is given - earn money using remixed, transformed, and built upon assets in your own resource pack ____________________________________________ ***With this resource pack, YOU MAY NOT:*** - redistribute this resource pack - port this resource pack or its assets to work on Minecraft Bedrock Edition - include unedited assets in your own resource pack, unless you have permission from the creator - include assets from this resource pack in a paid product or paid access to a product, unless you have permission from the creator ____________________________________________
